title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 27–30, this part focuses on Unknown person #25, Unknown person #26, Unknown person #27, Yamato, Unknown person #28 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: And eat it at the same time

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lady Luck has smiled upon us today...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thought we were going to eat it at the same time!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you've changed your mind

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My life just flashed before my eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I even gave up on my dream...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So now I've decided to do what- ever it takes

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to get off this island, even if it kills me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will write the greatest adventure book ever!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is with this fruit? It tastes like shit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know it's presump- Tuous of me to ask, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will you allow me to help you build another ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I don't want any regrets either

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Aaaa- Ahh!!! What the hell is this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Hold on a second, this fire is

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 38 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
